backend/src/main/java/com/cqlplatform/co.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet imports to align with Spring Boot 3.x and Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements.
backend/src/main/java/com/cqlplatform/co.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.servlet does not exist' on JDK 17+ with Spring Boot 3.
